Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12050 0 0}If only I could find someone who could steal our clients' hearts...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}There must be some handsome young man out there who could drive all the housewives wild...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}Where? I don't see anyone. For heaven's sake, quit wasting my precious time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This must be the man Maya was[n]talking about, the one she saw on TV...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But he doesn't seem to be interested in me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If I had enough {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} to be {f 4 31 1 4 1 0},[n]then maybe I could get his attention...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12069 0 0}Of course, you imbecile! I just need to find him![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Can I interest you in being a part of a promotional campaign I'm running...? Oh, you're still in high school?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hmm... That would mean... Perhaps, if I trained him...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The man seems to be[n]mumbling to himself...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems that my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}[n]has caught his attention.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12004 0 0}Say, young man... How would you like to have all your dreams come true? Well, do I have a golden opportunity for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12017 0 0}...Oh, really now. You'd pass up the chance to be rich beyond your wildest dreams?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, if that's what you want...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12061 0 0}Now, this stays between us, so don't go telling anyone, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}...I can make you rich, 100% guaranteed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}All you need is 20,000 yen, and your investment will multiply by ten— No, by one hundred![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}And the best part is, you don't even have to lift a finger! You'll become fabulously wealthy overnight![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}Just give me the 20,000 yen, and I'll take care of the rest.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...I don't have enough money.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12071 0 0}...What? You don't have that much? Well, I'm afraid the deal is off, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I gave the man 20,000 yen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12018 0 0}That'll do it. I'll be in touch once your fortune has been made.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12071 0 0}...Oh, really now. You'd pass up the chance to be rich beyond your wildest dreams?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, if that's what you want...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12008 0 0}Have you thought about what I told you last time?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}You can earn a fortune by investing just 20,000 yen.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}All you have to do is hand over the money.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...I don't have enough money.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12071 0 0}...What? You don't have that much? Well, I'm afraid the deal is off, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I gave the man 20,000 yen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12018 0 0}That'll do it. I'll be in touch once your fortune has been made.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12071 0 0}...Oh, really now. You'd pass up the chance to be rich beyond your wildest dreams?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, if that's what you want...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12015 0 0}I'll be in touch once your fortune has been made.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12004 0 0}Oh, there you are... I've been looking for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}I have some unfortunate news regarding your investment.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Things are not running as smoothly as planned. It still has the potential to turn a profit, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}I would require an additional 10,000 yen to get things back on track...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12093 0 0}Are you willing to increase your investment by that much?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...I don't have enough money.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12071 0 0}...What? You don't have that much? Well, I'm afraid the deal is off, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I gave the man 10,000 yen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12093 0 0}Yes, yes, very good. I'll be in touch once your fortune has been made.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12071 0 0}...Oh, really now. You'd pass up the chance to be rich beyond your wildest dreams?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, if that's what you want...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12001 0 0}Have you thought about what I told you last time?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}You can earn a fortune by investing just 10,000 yen more.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}All you have to do is give me the money.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...I don't have enough money.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12071 0 0}...What? You don't have that much? Well, I'm afraid the deal is off, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I gave the man 10,000 yen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12018 0 0}Yes, yes, very good. I'll be in touch once your fortune has been made.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12071 0 0}...Oh, really now. You'd pass up the chance to be rich beyond your wildest dreams?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, if that's what you want...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12035 0 0}You've got nothing to worry about. I'll be in touch once your fortune has been made.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}We ran into a bit of a snag again. Some of the other investors decided to drop out...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}But since there are few investors, everyone will make even more of a profit! So, would you mind investing some more?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}Just 10,000 yen more. That should be plenty![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...I don't have enough money.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12071 0 0}...What? You don't have that much? Well, I'm afraid the deal is off, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I gave the man 10,000 yen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12071 0 0}...Oh, really now. You'd pass up the chance to be rich beyond your wildest dreams?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, if that's what you want...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12004 0 0}Have you thought about what I told you last time?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}I just need another 10,000 yen from you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...I don't have enough money.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12071 0 0}...What? You don't have that much? Well, I'm afraid the deal is off, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I gave the man 10,000 yen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12071 0 0}...Oh, really now. You'd pass up the chance to be rich beyond your wildest dreams?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, if that's what you want...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}My foolish little apprentice...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12070 0 0}Have you not yet realized that you are being deceived? Everything I've said has clearly been suspicious![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}Ignorance should be a crime.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12052 0 0}Sure, you have some redeeming qualities, but if you remain this naive, everyone will take advantage of you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}...Stick with me, and I'll show you how to be a winner.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This man seems to be serious...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time[n]hearing him out...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12069 0 0}Oh my! You'd throw away this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, what a shame. Ignorance truly is a crime.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12077 0 0}Have you come back to be cheated out of even more money? It's high time you wised up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Stick with me, and I'll give you some advice worth that 40,000 yen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This man seems to be serious...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time[n]hearing him out...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12069 0 0}Oh my! You'd throw away this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, what a shame. Ignorance truly is a crime.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12007 0 0}Are you busy at the moment? If not, I can teach you a valuable life lesson...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}Free of charge, of course.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems like President Tanaka[n]wants to talk to me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time with him?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12071 0 0}Hmph... It's not that the poor don't have a chance. It's just that they don't seize an opportunity.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12009 0 0}Oh? Well, if it isn't {f 4 1}. Looks like you've something on your mind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_069_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12051 0 0}Hm? My autograph? Well, normally I'd charge an arm and a leg for this sort of thing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}But—just this once—I'll make an exception and give you one for free. In return, you better spread the word about my generosity![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_070_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}Here you go. Stick it in a frame, and it'll make one valuable family heirloom.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_071_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Now that I have an autograph from a[n]celebrity, I should show it to Elizabeth...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_072_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}Are you busy at the moment? If not, I can teach you a valuable life lesson...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}Free of charge, of course.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_073_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12093 0 0}My, aren't you enthusiastic. Then let's not waste any more time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_074_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}You look like you have some time to spare. Shall I give you some more valuable life lessons?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}Free of charge, of course.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_075_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}I like your attitude. All right, then let's get right to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_076_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}I believe you're at the peak of adolescence, correct? Then what I have to say might prove very interesting...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}Naturally, it's free of charge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_077_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}Caught your attention, did I? Well, you better listen carefully, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_078_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, {f 4 1}... Are you here for another life lesson?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}As per usual, it'll be free of charge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_079_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12050 0 0}I see... You're quite the honest young man, I'll give you that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_080_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}You came for another life lesson, didn't you? Why, it's written all over your face.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}Of course, it'll be entirely free of charge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_081_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12093 0 0}Oh my, such enthusiasm. Have I got you hook, line, and sinker?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_082_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}You're not busy at the moment, are you? Because I've got one riveting life lesson for you![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}Entirely free of charge, might I add.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_083_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}Yes, yes, very good. That enthusiasm of yours is absolutely adorable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_084_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}I can teach you a life lesson that you won't want to miss.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}And it's even free of charge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_085_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Then, for today... I have a story that's fresh off the press.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_086_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12093 0 0}You sure come by a lot, {f 4 1}. I must be doing something right, then.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I suppose that means the value of a life lesson depends on the learner...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, this one will be free of charge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_087_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12067 0 0}Excellent. I've been waiting for— Ah, never you mind. That's not important.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_088_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}I do have something of a life lesson in mind... Though it might not necessarily apply to you. Still interested?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_089_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12094 0 0}Heh, then let's not tarry any longer—the clock's ticking. Pay attention now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_090_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should ask about the results[n]of my investment another time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_220_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12014 0 0}Hmph... It's not that the poor don't have a chance. It's just that they don't seize the opportunities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_221_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12014 0 0}Hmph... It's not that the poor don't have a chance. It's just that they pass up the opportunities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_222_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12014 0 0}Hmph... It's not that the poor don't have a chance. It's just that they squander the opportunities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_223_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12014 0 0}Hmph... It's not that the poor don't have a chance. It's just that they give up the opportunities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_224_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12014 0 0}Hmph... It's not that the poor don't have a chance. It's just that they're afraid of the opportunities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_225_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12014 0 0}Hmph... It's not that the poor don't have a chance. It's just that they waste the opportunities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_226_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12014 0 0}Hmph... It's not that the poor don't have a chance. It's just that they don't have any initiative.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_227_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12014 0 0}Hmph... It's not that the poor don't have a chance. It's just that they don't care for the opportunities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_228_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 113 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 12014 0 0}Hmph... It's not that the poor don't have a chance. It's just that they don't notice the opportunities until it's too late.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EVENTPLAY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Message issued by the script. [n]{f 1 5 0}Comm Event Replay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_PERSPNA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel as if we can grow closer thanks to the[n]{f 2 4 2} Persona, {f 0 1 35}{f 2 4 5}{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_MAX
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel an unbreakable bond[n]with {f 2 4 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALMSG_BS_MAX
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel an unbreakable bond[n]with the elderly couple...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_RAN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I might grow closer[n]to {f 2 4 0} soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALMSG_BS_RANKUP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I might grow closer[n]to the elderly couple soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_NOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't think our bond will grow[n]any stronger even if I spend[n]more time with {f 2 4 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALMSG_BS_NORMAL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't think our bond will grow[n]any stronger even if I spend[n]more time with them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_MAX
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem that our relationship[n]can get any closer than it is...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I still spend time with them...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_SOLO_AS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time after[n]school with {f 2 4 0}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_SOLO_DT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the day[n]with {f 2 4 0}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND__GENERAL_MSG_NET
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend time online playing[n]the MMORPG with {f 2 4 0}...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_SOLO_NT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening[n]with {f 2 4 0}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_MULTIPLE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time after[n]school with the {f 2 4 1}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_FASHION_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time after[n]school at the fashion club?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_BOOKSTOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the day at the bookstore?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_BOOKSTOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time[n]after school at the bookstore?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_MULTIPLE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the night[n]with {f 2 4 1}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I saw your exam results. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Here, this is from the chairman.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}It's a reward for effectively balancing schoolwork as well as our... ahem, "extracurricular activities."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I placed at the top in the exams,[n]I also got this {f 4 4 1 37 1 3}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I saw your exam results. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Here, this is from the chairman.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}It's a reward for effectively balancing schoolwork as well as our... ahem, "extracurricular activities."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I saw your exam results. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Here, this is from the chairman.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}It's a reward for effectively balancing schoolwork as well as our... ahem, "extracurricular activities."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I placed at the top in the exams,[n]I also got this {f 4 4 1 37 1 3}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I saw your exam results. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Here, this is from the chairman.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}It's a reward for effectively balancing schoolwork as well as our... ahem, "extracurricular activities."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I saw your exam results. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's admirable how you continue to excel in school while fighting arduous battle after battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}I got you a gift to acknowledge all your hard work. Here, take it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}未使用ラベルです。[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}I saw your exam results. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}It's admirable how you continue to excel in school while fighting arduous battle after battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}I got you a gift to acknowledge all your hard work. Here, take it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I placed at the top in the exams,[n]I also got this {f 4 4 1 37 1 3}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}I saw your exam results. Good work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's admirable how you continue to excel in school while fighting arduous battle after battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}I got you a gift to acknowledge all your hard work. Here, take it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I placed at the top in the exams,[n]I also got this {f 4 4 1 37 1 3}.[n]{f 1 1}
